# Muffin Framework

Muffin is a client-side Web Components framework built by Footloose Labs. It has two packages:
- `@muffin/element` — core: DOMComponent, PostOffice, createStore, Router
- `@muffin/atom-websdk` — network layer: WebRequestSdk, Service, DOM extensions

Both ship as a single CDN bundle (`sdk.min.js`). After loading, everything is available under `window.Muffin`.

Current stable version: atom-websdk 3.1.7 / element 0.9.3
CDN: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/FootLooseLabs/atom-websdk@3.1.7/dist/sdk.min.js

---

## Documentation pages

### Guide
- [Getting Started](/guide/getting-started) — CDN setup, Vite/ESM install, first component
- [Components](/guide/components) — DOMComponent lifecycle, markupFunc, event binding, data attributes, derived state, scoped styles
- [Reactive State (uiVars)](/guide/ui-vars) — Proxy-based local state, batched rendering, shallow proxy caveats, uiVars vs stores
- [Stores](/guide/stores) — createStore(), shared reactive state, persistence (IndexedDB), socket sync
- [State Machine](/guide/state-machine) — stateSpace, transitionSpace, switchState, composedScope timing after switchState
- [PostOffice](/guide/post-office) — cross-component pub/sub, advertised interfaces, WebSocket routing, initSubscriptions
- [WebSocket SDK](/guide/websdk) — WebRequestSdk, interface address syntax (receptive `:::` vs expressive `|||`), Service pattern

### API Reference
- [DOMComponent](/api/dom-component) — full static/instance property reference, lifecycle, dynamic child attribute limitation, composedScope
- [createStore()](/api/create-store) — parameters, return value, persistence, socket sync, component declaration pattern
- [PostOffice](/api/post-office) — static methods, sockets, PostOffice.Socket
- [Service](/api/service) — static service pattern, subscribe from static context, built-in TTL cache, interface/subscription locking
- [DOM Extensions](/api/dom-extensions) — getElement, getElements, toggleBtnBusyState, toggleRootAttr, toggleSurface, awaitChildLoad, initSubscriptions, callParent
- [WebRequestSdk](/api/web-request-sdk) — connect, request, websubscribe, communicate, Muffin.WebInterface singleton

### Patterns
- [Muffin + Tailwind + Vite](/patterns/muffin-only) — project structure, 3_app.js, component and service example
- [React + Muffin](/patterns/react-muffin) — Muffin as WebSocket/service layer only, React owns UI, service classes from hooks
- [Managing Services Across Projects](/patterns/service-monorepo) — private services monorepo for orgs, registry.json, muf services add, vite alias pattern

### CLI
- [.mufrc.json (Private Registries)](/cli/mufrc) — config file for private component, template, and services registries; GITHUB_TOKEN; per-command behaviour

### Migration
- [Upgrading to v3.0.0](/migration/v3) — breaking changes from v2, new createStore/derived/esc features, upgrade checklist
- [Component Migration: v2 → v3](/migration/components) — reactive uiVars, nested mutations, renderSelectively removal, childscope, getParent timing

### Reference
- [Known Issues](/known-issues) — confirmed bugs, architectural limitations, and resolved issues from real-world projects
